content.query:
select  * from OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://batch25synapseadls.dfs.core.windows.net/raw/custdata.csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,    
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) as d1;

select  * from OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://inceptezadlsbankdata.dfs.core.windows.net/bankdata/bank_txns.csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,    
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) as d1;

select  * from OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'bank_txns.csv',
    DATA_SOURCE = 'bankdata_source',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,    
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) as d1;

CREATE MASTER KEY ENCRYPTION BY PASSWORD = 'AzureInceptez#1234'

DROP  DATABASE SCOPED CREDENTIAL creds;

CREATE DATABASE SCOPED CREDENTIAL creds
WITH IDENTITY = 'SHARED ACCESS SIGNATURE',
SECRET = 'sv=2025-11-05&ss=bfqt&srt=sco&sp=rwdlacupyx&se=2026-04-30T09:52:56Z&st=2026-04-08T01:37:56Z&spr=https&sig=6obrqPIL87OdCP5Q3RQtWiB4qzWJ4gkurmUuaCVQQgs%3D'

-- 1. Drop the existing data source so you can recreate it
DROP EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE bankdata_source;
GO

-- 2. Recreate with the 'dfs' endpoint AND the container name included
CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE bankdata_source
WITH
(
    LOCATION = 'https://inceptezadlsbankdata.dfs.core.windows.net/bankdata/', 
    CREDENTIAL = creds
);

GO

-- 3. Query just the file name (or folder/file if it's inside a subfolder)
SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'bank_txns.csv', -- Removed 'bankdata/' since it's now in the data source
    DATA_SOURCE = 'bankdata_source',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,    
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) 
WITH
(
    txn_id VARCHAR(100)
) as d1;


---- DB Scoped Credentials using Managed Identity


--Step1: Create credentials

CREATE DATABASE SCOPED CREDENTIAL creds_mi
WITH IDENTITY = 'Managed Identity';

--step2: Goto storage account, provide "Storage Blob data contributor" role for the synapse ws managed identity

--Step3: Create external data source

CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE bankdata_source_mi
WITH
(
    LOCATION = 'https://inceptezadlsbankdata.dfs.core.windows.net/bankdata/', 
    CREDENTIAL = creds_mi
);

--Step4: Query the file
SELECT * FROM OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'bank_txns.csv', 
    DATA_SOURCE = 'bankdata_source_mi',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,    
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) 
WITH
(
    txn_id VARCHAR(100)
) as d1;

---------------Create External Table----------------------------

--Step1: Create external data source = bankdata_source_mi
--Step2: Create external file format = synapse_csv_format
--Step3: Create external table

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE ext_bankdata
(
    txn_id VARCHAR(10),
	txn_date VARCHAR(10),
	cust_id VARCHAR(10),
	amount FLOAT,
	branch VARCHAR(50),
	region VARCHAR(100),
	payment_type VARCHAR(10)
)
WITH
(
    LOCATION = 'bank_txns.csv',
    DATA_SOURCE = bankdata_source_mi,
    FILE_FORMAT = synapse_csv_format
);

select * from ext_bankdata;


-- To get the list of external file format
SELECT * FROM sys.external_file_formats;

-- To get the list of external data source
SELECT * FROM sys.external_data_sources;

--To get the list of external tables
SELECT * FROM sys.external_tables;

--To get the list of columns in external table
SELECT * FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS where TABLE_NAME='ext_txns';

--To get the size of data processed
SELECT * FROM sys.dm_external_data_processed;

--CTAS
Create Table extdata AS
select * from ext_bankdata
